AuditEvent.target: Rule: Validation DateConfig Rule For 15days Trigger

entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Validation DateConfig Rule For 15days Trigger Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User 1045

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE List PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <List> <ProvisioningTransaction accountDisplayName="CN=Aaron Allen,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com" applicationName="ActiveDirectory" created="1751866832862" id="0000007185" identityDisplayName="Aaron Allen" identityName="Aaron Allen" integration="ActiveDirectory" modified="1751866832864" name="0000007185" nativeIdentity="CN=Aaron Allen,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com" operation="Create" significantModified="1751866832864" source="IdentityRefresh" status="Success" type="Auto"> <Attributes> <Map> <entry key="request"> <value> <AccountRequest application="ActiveDirectory" nativeIdentity="CN=Aaron Allen,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com" op="Create" targetIntegration="ActiveDirectory"> <Attributes> <Map> <entry key="provisioningTransactionId" value="0000007185"/> </Map> </Attributes> <AttributeRequest assignmentId="e8db525c7da44cf2a8137d330f2fc625" name="memberOf" op="Add" value="CN=AccountsReceivable,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"> <Attributes> <Map> <entry key="assignment"> <value> <Boolean>true</Boolean> </value> </entry> </Map> </Attributes> </AttributeRequest> <AttributeRequest name="sAMAccountName" op="Set" value="Aaron Allen"/> <AttributeRequest name="givenName" op="Set" value="Aaron"/> <AttributeRequest name="sn" op="Set" value="Allen"/> <AttributeRequest name="mail" op="Set" value="aaron.allen@eshiam.com"/> <AttributeRequest name="password" op="Set"/> <ProvisioningResult status="committed"/> </AccountRequest> </value> </entry> </Map> </Attributes> </ProvisioningTransaction> </List>
